name: perfect-goal
description: Build 100x-leverage goal prompts with a 13-section template + 44-point rubric

interface.longDescription: Produce goal prompts that let an executing agent run with zero discretionary calls left. Three-phase workflow (evidence-first synthesis → gap inventory → density compression), 13-section output, 44-point rubric, 7-type adaptive section matrix.
defaultPrompt: Build a perfect goal for X
Use perfect-goal to plan this rollout
